x-component.description: Extracts tokens from the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

tokenizeSource.description: Create selected tokens for source locale
tokenizeSource.title: Tokenize Source

tokenizeTargets.description: Create selected tokens for target locales
tokenizeTargets.title: Tokenize Targets

WORD.description: A run of characters constituting a word of the given language.
WORD.title: WORD

HYPHENATED_WORD.description: A word including hyphens of various types
HYPHENATED_WORD.title: HYPHENATED_WORD

NUMBER.description: Numbers, including any commas or points symbols.
NUMBER.title: NUMBER

PUNCTUATION.description: Punctuation characters as defined by the Unicode Consortium standards.
PUNCTUATION.title: PUNCTUATION

WHITESPACE.description: Whitespace characters as defined by the Unicode Consortium standards.
WHITESPACE.title: WHITESPACE

ABBREVIATION.description: Limited types of English abbreviations like pct in 3.3pct, U.S., USD.
ABBREVIATION.title: ABBREVIATION

INTERNET.description: An Internet address (URI or IP): http://www.somesite.org/foo/index.html, 192.168.0.5.
INTERNET.title: INTERNET

EMOJI.description: All emoji characters defined in Unicode
EMOJI.title: EMOJI

TIME.description: Time separated by either ":" or "." (24 hour, 12 hour with AM or PM).
TIME.title: TIME

MARKUP.description: A run that begins with "<" and ends with ">" like in HTML and XML.
MARKUP.title: MARKUP

IDEOGRAM.description: Ideograms as defined by the Unicode Consortium standards.
IDEOGRAM.title: IDEOGRAM
